claims.text: The optimizer used in Attention Is All You Need is the Adam optimizer.
claims.verification_reason: Evidence directly states "We used the Adam optimizer" in the Optimizer section.

claims.text: The exact beta1 value specified for the optimizer is 0.9.
The exact beta2 value specified for the optimizer is 0.98.
The exact epsilon value specified for the optimizer is 10^{-9}.
The learning rate is increased linearly for the first warmup_steps training steps and decreased thereafter proportionally to the inverse square root of the step number, with warmup_steps = 4000.
claims.verification_reason: Both passages together directly support: "increasing the learning rate linearly for the first warmup_steps training steps, and decreasing it thereafter proportionally to the inverse square root of the step number. We used warmup_steps = 4000."
